caption:
Subtler than the subtle, greater than the great — the Self is hidden in the cave of the heart. The desireless one, freed from grief, by the grace of the Creator, sees the majesty of the Self.

— Katha Upanishad 1.2.20 (Krishna Yajur Veda)
